summary: Tested Text Templates (Textbausteine) feature for Vortext/Schlusstext. Backend API 100% working (16/16 tests passed). Frontend Settings page Text Template Management working correctly. CRITICAL ISSUE: NewQuotePage.jsx and NewInvoicePage.jsx with TextTemplateSelect are NOT being used - routes use WysiwygDocumentEditor which lacks vortext/schlusstext fields.

integration_issues.issue: NewQuotePage.jsx is NOT used - route /quotes/new uses WysiwygDocumentEditor instead
NewInvoicePage.jsx is NOT used - route /invoices/new uses WysiwygDocumentEditor instead
EditDocumentModal.jsx is defined but NOT imported or used anywhere in the app
WysiwygDocumentEditor (used for /quotes/new, /invoices/new, /orders/new) does not have vortext/schlusstext fields

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/text-templates returns templates
Backend: GET /api/text-templates?doc_type=angebot filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/text-templates?text_type=vortext filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/text-templates/placeholders returns 7 placeholders
Backend: POST /api/text-templates creates Vortext template
Backend: POST /api/text-templates creates Schlusstext template
Backend: POST /api/text-templates with invalid doc_type returns 400
Backend: POST /api/text-templates with invalid text_type returns 400
Backend: PUT /api/text-templates/{id} updates template
Backend: PUT /api/text-templates/non-existent returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/text-templates/{id} deletes template
Backend: DELETE /api/text-templates/non-existent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/quotes accepts vortext and schlusstext
Backend: PUT /api/quotes/{id} saves vortext and schlusstext
Backend: POST /api/invoices accepts vortext and schlusstext
Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} saves vortext and schlusstext
Frontend Settings: Text Template Management section visible
Frontend Settings: Tabs for Angebot/Auftragsbestätigung/Rechnung switch correctly
Frontend Settings: Can create new Schlusstext template
Frontend Settings: Modal has title, content, save button and placeholder buttons
action_items: CRITICAL: Either update App.js routes to use NewQuotePage/NewInvoicePage instead of WysiwygDocumentEditor, OR add vortext/schlusstext fields with TextTemplateSelect to WysiwygDocumentEditor
Import and use EditDocumentModal in QuotesPage/InvoicesPage/OrdersPage for editing documents, OR remove the unused component
The TextTemplateSelect component is fully implemented but not accessible to users due to routing
critical_code_review_comments: NewQuotePage.jsx and NewInvoicePage.jsx are orphaned - they have TextTemplateSelect but are not used in routing
WysiwygDocumentEditor.jsx (1158 lines) is used for all document creation but lacks vortext/schlusstext support
EditDocumentModal.jsx has TextTemplateSelect but is never imported anywhere
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/NewInvoicePage.jsx - Added missing companySettings state and vortext/schlusstext to API payload
/app/frontend/src/components/EditDocumentModal.jsx - Fixed duplicate export and added settings loading

success_rate.frontend: Settings page 100%, Document creation pages 0% (vortext/schlusstext not accessible)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Schlusstext Angebot template during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Text Templates backend API fully working. Settings page TextTemplateManagement component works. CRITICAL: The vortext/schlusstext fields with TextTemplateSelect are implemented in NewQuotePage.jsx, NewInvoicePage.jsx, and EditDocumentModal.jsx but NONE of these are used in the app routing. The app uses WysiwygDocumentEditor for document creation which does NOT have vortext/schlusstext fields. Main agent needs to either: (1) Update routes to use NewQuotePage/NewInvoicePage, or (2) Add vortext/schlusstext with TextTemplateSelect to WysiwygDocumentEditor.
rca_of_the_issue: The TextTemplateSelect component and vortext/schlusstext fields were added to NewQuotePage.jsx, NewInvoicePage.jsx, and EditDocumentModal.jsx, but the App.js routing was not updated to use these components. Instead, routes still point to WysiwygDocumentEditor which was the original document editor without vortext/schlusstext support. This is a routing/integration issue, not a component implementation issue.
